data.title: Securitas AB Interim Report Q2 2026 | January-June
data.description: In the second quarter of 2026, total sales in Stockholm amounted to MSEK 37,843, showing a slight decrease from the previous period at MSEK 38,564. While organic sales growth remained stagnant at 0 percent compared to 5 percent earlier, adjusted organic sales growth saw a positive trend at 3 percent. Notably, real sales growth within the technology and solutions segment was recorded at 5 percent, up from 4 percent. The operating income before amortization stood at MSEK 2,824, a slight increase from MSEK 2,798 in the corresponding period.

data.title: Vance leads 2028 with 19.85%, Trump at 1.35%. Trump shifts support to Rick Jackson after GA primary loss. 2026 race tightens.
data.description: President Donald Trump had initially supported a different candidate for Georgia governor, but following their loss in the GOP primary, he now endorses Rick Jackson. Trump is urging party unity as the 2026 battleground race in Georgia is expected to be closely contested.

data.title: Loomis Interim Report January - June 2026
data.description: In Stockholm on July 24, 2026, there was a report of sustained impressive expansion and a historic operating margin (EBITA %). A statement from President and CEO Aritz Larrea highlighted the company's exceptional performance in the quarter, attributing it to the effective implementation of their strategy and the robustness of their diversified business model. The revenue figures have shown significant growth, underlining the company's success in the current market landscape.

data.title: Xryma Plc : Pre-Listing Liquidity Facility and Price Discovery Process
data.description: Cyprus-based company, Xryma Plc, has declared its plans to reapply for listing on Euronext Paris within the coming year. The admission process is contingent upon approval from Euronext. Prior to finalizing its application, Xryma will need to meet the requirements set by Euronext.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Centers Lab NJ LLC Under Investigation for Data Breach of Over 542,000 Patient Records
data.description: An ongoing investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco has revealed a data breach resulting in the unauthorized access of sensitive information belonging to 542,377 patients of Centers Lab NJ LLC, operating under the name Centers Laboratory. The breach occurred on July 24, 2026, and has raised concerns regarding the security of personal data. The affected patients are urged to monitor their information closely and take necessary precautions to safeguard their privacy in light of this incident.

data.title: Democratic senator criticizes GOP's CLARITY Act as "garbage," as Senate Republicans release a proposal with ethics concerns.
data.description: Senate Republicans unveiled the draft text of the CLARITY Act on Wednesday. The proposed legislation is facing opposition from Democrats due to concerns over ethics regulations.
